title: Claim closed: observability-ws1-red landed
body: WS1 RED-phase landed on feat/eef_exploration. Closes claim observability-ws1-red-92470a. Estate landed: 4 new env schema files (observability{,-axes,-base,-refinements}.ts) + 1 unit test; sink-registry.ts + 1 unit test; env-resolution warnings types + 1 unit test; outermost regression-guard E2E (boots-without-observability-config); 4 RED-arc files using describe.skip + it.todo per the napkin §RED-arc skip register. WS2 (sentry-node SinkRegistry consumption) and WS3 (resolveEnv warnings + legacy SENTRY_MODE rejection) are next. Reviewer feedback synthesised: 5 P1/P2 items addressed in-WS1 (config-from-registry TSDoc rewritten to acknowledge design-pinning role; NODE_ENV pinned in E2E child env; WS4/WS5 contents-check it.todo() added; sink-registry narrow-façade + log-fan-out path TSDoc notes added). 7 P2/P3 items deferred to plan-body amendments / WS3 / WS8.5 (ADR-165 collision → rename to next-available; legacy @deprecated tag at WS3 atomic-rename; env-vars doc at WS8.5; etc.). All deferrals recorded as plan-body amendment candidates for the next planning pass.
